query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A sepia-toned street scene showing a stone building facade with an arched doorway and a long planter box filled with trailing plants in the foreground. A man in dark clothing stands with his back to the viewer near the left side. Superimposed over the stone wall and near the arched doorway, a translucent woman's face with a hand raised appears as a ghostly overlay, creating a layered portrait integrated into the architectural scene.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A sepia-toned street scene with a soft, blurred quality showing a stone building facade with an arched doorway and a planter of trailing plants. The image is deliberately double-exposed, merging a ghostly translucent portrait of a woman's face and raised hand into the stone wall and doorway, creating a surreal, dreamlike effect. The washed-out, muted sepia palette removes all color vibrancy, enhancing the ethereal, otherworldly atmosphere of the layered composition.
